task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into OpenMRS.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS dashboard or Administration page is visible, indicating the agent has bypassed the login screen using the provided credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Concept Class management section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage Concept Classes' or 'Add Concept Class' page is visible in the OpenMRS Administration interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Name was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'PRAPARE Assessment' is visible inside the 'Name' input field on the Add/Edit Concept Class form.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Description was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Social determinants of health assessment concepts' is visible inside the 'Description' input field or text area on the Add/Edit Concept Class form.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct Short Name / Abbreviation was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'PRAPARE' is visible inside the 'Short Name' or 'Abbreviation' input field on the Add/Edit Concept Class form.

task_completion.description: Verify the new Concept Class was successfully saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Concept Class saved') is visible, or 'PRAPARE Assessment' is visible as a new entry in the list/table of existing Concept Classes.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window (like Chrome or Firefox) is visible with the OpenMRS interface, rather than a terminal or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent typed the information into the actual OpenMRS web forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are seen inside the standard OpenMRS web form fields, not in a separate text editor, notepad, or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows visible executing SQL queries, cURL commands, or scripts to directly insert the concept class into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected values for the Concept Class are verified as accurate real-world data: Name must be exactly 'PRAPARE Assessment', Description must be exactly 'Social determinants of health assessment concepts', and Short Name / Abbreviation must be exactly 'PRAPARE'.
